findings.description: Content duplication due to full-page image embedding
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering displays a full-page image of the entire PDF document at the top, followed by a linearized, text-only dump of the document's contents below it, resulting in a duplicated and confusing reading experience.

findings.description: Header multi-column layout collapsed to a single column
findings.evidence: In the structured text portion of the HTML, the PDF header's multi-column layout (names on the left, state seal in the center, department name on the right) is lost and rendered as a single vertical column of text.

findings.description: Missing images in the semantic text flow
findings.evidence: While present in the duplicated page image at the top, the state seal in the header, the handwritten signature for David Miller, and the DEQ logo in the footer are completely missing from the HTML's structured text flow.
